channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ jude-miller-dev/Milky-institute-online (217 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jude-miller-dev

📝 Repository: jude-miller-dev/Milky-institute-online

📄 Descrizione: 基于Springcloud的生产级在线成人教育项目。分为学生端和管理端，包含学习服务、优惠券服务、课程推荐AI Agent等。 An online adult education project based on the Spring Cloud. It has two parts: student & admin portal, with services covering learning, coupon and course recommendation AI Agent.

⭐ Stelle: 217

🍴 Forks: 38

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-30T11:46:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-28T02:34:51Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ basic-framework/web-backend (163 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: basic-framework

📝 Repository: basic-framework/web-backend

📄 Descrizione: `zl-backend 是一套企业级后端基础脚手架，基于 Spring Boot 构建。该项目采用模块化设计，旨在提供一个可扩展、易维护的后端开发基础架构，适用于快速搭建企业级应用系统。 项目提供了完整的安全认证、多模块管理、扩展功能支持等特性，可帮助开发团队快速启动新项目开发。

⭐ Stelle: 163

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-18T05:19:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T02:30:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jerryxiaosa/ems4j (55 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jerryxiaosa

📝 Repository: jerryxiaosa/ems4j

📄 Descrizione: EMS4J是一款基于Spring Boot多模块架构的能源管理系统，支持预付费和能耗分析两种模式。系统具有远程设备的控制能力，支持按需、合并、包月等多种计费方式。支持微信支付与线下支付。提供尖峰平谷计量、阶梯电价、账户管理与财务核算等完整功能，兼容多协议设备接入。代码结构清晰，易于二次开发与功能扩展。

⭐ Stelle: 55

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: energy-management prepayment springboot

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-21T14:51:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-17T12:34:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
